workstreamName: Unified actionable Lead Card and reconciled executive counts
operatorOutcome: Manual intake immediately creates one durable actionable Lead Card, automatically starts progressive research, and the same opportunity drives Acquisitions, Mission Control, Jarvis explanations, and Lead-to-Deal promotion.

requirements.text: Manual lead entry creates one durable Lead Card immediately and automatically starts research.
Mission Control, Acquisitions, Jarvis explanations, and database counts derive from the same opportunity records and reconcile.
The Lead Card progressively updates, remains actionable, and never blocks a discovery call because research is incomplete.
County/public/property research progress and provider failures are visible, actionable, and recoverable.
The owner can promote the same opportunity from Lead to Deal and the pursued card receives a subtle visible highlight.

steps: Observe progressive research state and actions
Reconcile all executive counts and drilldowns

requiredVisibleOutcomes: Must NOT occur: duplicate competing opportunity created
Must NOT occur: research does not start
Must NOT occur: pursuit copies a record
Must NOT occur: incomplete research blocks a discovery call
mandate: Actively attempt to prove the implementation wrong; never repeat the builder's conclusions.
Open the actual running localhost dashboard in a real browser.
Navigate the full affected workflow; click every relevant control and open every affected tab.
Exercise relevant forms, maps, filters, tables, links, and actions.
Compare visible frontend output with API responses and, when appropriate, database records.
Compare visible output with accepted operator facts.
Refresh the browser and verify persistence; when restart persistence is required, restart via npm run landos:restart and reopen the workflow.
Capture fresh screenshots and exact reproduction steps for every failure.
Judge business meaning and operator usability, not merely whether pages load.
Return a non-passing result whenever an internally fixable issue remains.
After repairs, run the exact same journey again.
